description: generate a custom .mplstyle style sheet (and optional preview PNG) from a named preset
rules: forces MPLBACKEND=Agg so plt.show() never blocks
degrades gracefully when matplotlib is not importable
usage: Set STYLE_PRESET (publication|presentation|web|dark|minimal). Optional STYLE_OUT (.mplstyle filename). Outputs: the .mplstyle sheet under record_store, plus a *_preview.png alongside it.
limitation: Read-only: emits a style sheet from one of the five built-in presets — it does not run the interactive customization mode. Requires matplotlib (and numpy for the preview render); degrades to a placeholder if matplotlib is absent.
